summary: Frontend testing completed successfully for status badges in Transfers Queue and other admin features. All status badge colors are correctly implemented: SUBMITTED=amber/yellow, COMPLETED=green, REJECTED=red. EU currency format verified throughout.
passed_tests: ✅ Admin login functionality (admin@ecommbx.io / Admin@123456) - redirects to /admin correctly
✅ Transfers Queue - SUBMITTED tab: Shows amber/yellow badges (bg-amber-50, text-amber-700)
✅ Transfers Queue - COMPLETED tab: Shows green badges (bg-green-50, text-green-700)
✅ Transfers Queue - REJECTED tab: Shows red badges (bg-red-50, text-red-700)
✅ Transfers Queue - Amounts display in EU format (€X.XXX,XX): e.g., €199.235,00, €655.788,00, €112.350,00
✅ Users tab pagination: 'Showing 50 of 111 users', 'Page 1 of 3'
✅ Users tab pagination controls: First, Previous, Next, Last buttons present
✅ Users tab search: 'guido' search returns 2 matching users correctly
✅ Accounts tab: Displays accounts with masked balances (€ •••••), IBAN/BIC, action buttons
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested with existing transfers data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Status badges in Transfers Queue are working correctly with professional banking colors. The getStatusBadgeClasses() utility in /app/frontend/src/utils/transactions.js handles all status colors correctly. SUBMITTED/PENDING=amber, COMPLETED/POSTED=green, REJECTED/FAILED=red. EU currency formatting also verified working throughout.
